name: Pre-pregnancy cardiac output baseline
tier_rationale: Tier B pending re-review. Source citation: mahendru-2014-cardiac-output. Technique: Inert-gas rebreathing. Population: Healthy nulliparous women, pre-conception measurement.
notes: Cardiac output at the start of gestation, before pregnancy-induced rise.

name: Pre-pregnancy mean arterial pressure
tier_rationale: Tier B pending re-review. Source citation: mahendru-2014-cardiac-output. Technique: Brachial-cuff oscillometric MAP. Population: Healthy nulliparous women, pre-conception.
notes: Mean arterial pressure at the start of gestation.

name: Pre-pregnancy uterine artery flow
tier_rationale: Tier B pending re-review. Source citation: thaler-1990-uterine-flow. Technique: Pulsed-wave Doppler, bilateral uterine arteries. Population: Healthy women, pre-pregnancy or early first trimester.

applicability.population: Healthy women, pre-pregnancy or early first trimester

notes: Combined bilateral uterine artery flow at the start of gestation.

name: Between-individual sigma for cardiac output
tier_rationale: Tier C pending re-review. Source citation: hunter-robson-1992-cardiac-output. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies.
notes: Fractional one-sigma between-individual variation around the population cardiac-output trajectory (e.g. 0.13 = 13%).

name: Gestational week of peak cardiac output
tier_rationale: Tier B pending re-review. Source citation: mahendru-2014-cardiac-output. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies.
notes: Gestational age (weeks) at which cardiac output reaches its maximum.

name: Cardiac-output trajectory spread parameter
tier_rationale: Tier C pending re-review. Source citation: hunter-robson-1992-cardiac-output. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies. Caveats: Derived from a Gaussian-shape fit to the cohort curves; original sources report point estimates rather than a shape parameter.
notes: Gaussian-curve spread (weeks) controlling how quickly cardiac output rises and falls around its peak. Caveats: Derived from a Gaussian-shape fit to the cohort curves; original sources report point estimates rather than a shape parameter.

name: Between-individual sigma for MAP
tier_rationale: Tier C pending re-review. Source citation: sanghavi-rutherford-2014-cardio-review. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies.
notes: One-sigma between-individual variation around the MAP trajectory.

name: Mid-pregnancy MAP nadir drop
tier_rationale: Tier B pending re-review. Source citation: mahendru-2014-cardiac-output. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies.
notes: Maximum drop in MAP from baseline during the mid-pregnancy systemic-vasodilation phase.

name: Gestational week of MAP nadir
tier_rationale: Tier B pending re-review. Source citation: mahendru-2014-cardiac-output. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies.
notes: Gestational age (weeks) at which MAP reaches its lowest value.

name: MAP trajectory spread parameter
tier_rationale: Tier C pending re-review. Source citation: sanghavi-rutherford-2014-cardio-review. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies.
notes: Gaussian spread (weeks) controlling the width of the MAP nadir dip.

name: Peak gestational excess cardiac output
tier_rationale: Tier B pending re-review. Source citation: mahendru-2014-cardiac-output. Technique: Inert-gas rebreathing, longitudinal cohort. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies.
notes: Excess cardiac output above baseline at peak (mid-third-trimester).

name: Term uterine artery flow
tier_rationale: Tier B pending re-review. Source citation: thaler-1990-uterine-flow. Technique: Pulsed-wave Doppler, bilateral uterine arteries. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies, term.
notes: Combined bilateral uterine artery flow at term.

name: Uterine artery flow growth rate
tier_rationale: Tier C pending re-review. Source citation: thaler-1990-uterine-flow. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies. Caveats: Fit parameter; not directly reported. Derived to match Doppler-cohort means at sampled gestational ages.
notes: Logistic growth-rate parameter for uterine artery flow expansion. Caveats: Fit parameter; not directly reported. Derived to match Doppler-cohort means at sampled gestational ages.

name: Between-individual sigma for uterine flow
tier_rationale: Tier C pending re-review. Source citation: thaler-1990-uterine-flow. Population: Healthy singleton pregnancies.
notes: Fractional one-sigma between-individual variation around the uterine-flow trajectory.
